title: Department Manager Vacancy at Lifestyle - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Lifestyle - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Lifestyle! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Meerut team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Lifestyle:
Lifestyle is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lifestyle!
